_description: AI Velocity Portal - Leader/POC/Manager Reference File
_how_it_works: Backend main.py uses 'reports_Level7' (employee login) to determine the L7 leader. The POC column determines who the AI Velocity POC is for that employee.

Kevin.note: Kevin has 2 POCs: Arunima for HYD employees, Komal for PNQ employees

poc_summary_table._format: L7 Leader | POC Name | POC Login | Location

_usage_in_backend: The backend main.py MANAGER_TO_LEADER dict maps 'Your Manager' field from SharePoint CSV → leader. The key insight from this Excel is: every employee's 'reports Level7' column tells us which L7 they belong to. So when we see a submission, we look up their manager name and route to the correct leader.
_update_instructions: 1. Find their 'reports Level7' login in this file to know which leader they belong to
2. Add their manager (Supervisor Login ID) to MANAGER_TO_LEADER in backend/main.py
3. Map it to the correct leader+poc combo
IMPORTANT: The POC is determined by the 'reports Level7' column, NOT the process.
The POC mapping from Excel overrides the old process-based mapping.
